title: What is the purpose of
wikitext:
[]: What is the purpose of.....             Quote Post by Sachi » Mon Apr 23, 2007 8:03 pm the Eva's mouths, i kno, its already supossed to b sealed shut, when they're not berserk. but why dont they just seal the actual mouth like they did with the rest of the body, because the nose used to b there, right?

[]:             Quote Post by slothen » Mon Apr 23, 2007 8:07 pm A) Roaring B) Eating C) Performing various (read: lesbian) sex acts.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Mon Apr 23, 2007 8:08 pm but seriously, Nerv already cut off everything else that seem almost human from them, why did they stop at the mouth?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Apr 23, 2007 8:15 pm Sachiel_13 wrote: but seriously, Nerv already cut off everything else that seem almost human from them

[]:             Quote Post by Ayana-Me » Mon Apr 23, 2007 8:15 pm I'm thinking that it would be kinda difficult to "cut off" the mouth. Or just unnecessary. If the Eva's didn't have mouths, there would be some plot elements that would need to be changed, like Unit 01 ingesting the S2 engine.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Mon Apr 23, 2007 8:18 pm i know that, but im not saying to cut it off, just to seal it off like they probably did with some other *cough* places.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Apr 23, 2007 8:28 pm Sachiel_13 wrote: i know that, but im not saying to cut it off, just to seal it off like they probably did with some other *cough* places.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Mon Apr 23, 2007 8:30 pm yeah, but you would think that Nerv would come to there senses and get a stronger piece of metal, so they wouldnt always have to replace the weaker one whenever the Eva's go berserk

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Apr 23, 2007 8:39 pm Sachiel_13 wrote: yeah, but you would think that Nerv would come to there senses and get a stronger piece of metal, so they wouldnt always have to replace the weaker one whenever the Eva's go berserk

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Mon Apr 23, 2007 11:20 pm Reichu wrote: I kind of wonder how Kyoko-sama does all of that roaring in #25' without giving us a blatant jaw-pop. Much to my delight, they got rid of that silly "whole helmet pop" gimmick in the TV series (yes, a GOOD change!), and we get to see that her helmet has those funky teeth as per 01 and 03, however well-concealed. I woulda loved to see Kyoko-sama roaring with mouth agape and nasty teeth bared for all to see.

[]:             Quote Post by master0rolando » Tue Apr 24, 2007 1:11 am if they created the Eva...why give them mouths in the first place?

[]:             Quote Post by Shin-seiki » Tue Apr 24, 2007 6:03 am master0rolando wrote: if they created the Eva...why give them mouths in the first place?

[]:             Quote Post by Tokpile Quohog » Tue Apr 24, 2007 6:24 pm Shin-seiki wrote: Cuz Evas are giant humans, and humans have mouths.

[]:             Quote Post by slothen » Tue Apr 24, 2007 6:35 pm i still think they are giant mutated Rei clones.

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Tue Apr 24, 2007 7:04 pm WHAT????? Rei is a Lilim and the Evas are clones of Adam so how exactly does that work?

[]:             Quote Post by slothen » Tue Apr 24, 2007 7:59 pm im embarassed to say, english dub(lol) of 23' . and crappy logic. "What? evas are human?" "Yes, inside each eva is a human soul. But the only one that can hold a soul, is Rei." My reasoning was that Rei clones were soulless, which made sense. The 'evas are human' part, suggested that the bodies were somewhat human. Clone Rei is supersized and morphed.. (gene therapy with adam dna?) and built into an eva. Then soul is taken during a contact experiment, and finally the guinea pig's kid becomes a pilot. Presto eva! As I mentioned earlier in a different thread, Evas have to grow from something, you can't manufacture Adam DNA into an entire massive body without putting it in something and letting it grow.

[]:             Quote Post by V » Tue Apr 24, 2007 9:19 pm Question: Did Eva 00 even HAVE a mouth?

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Tue Apr 24, 2007 10:09 pm V wrote: Question: Did Eva 00 even HAVE a mouth?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Apr 24, 2007 11:01 pm The fact that EVA-00 has two separate jaw pieces seems to imply that, yes, there is a mouth under there. As for Evas being human -- however you want to interpret Ritsuko's words, they are based upon Adam, the "first human"* and mother of the race of "humans who abandoned human form"... * Which is true in the sense of Adam being the first human to inhabit Earth.

[]:             Quote Post by Coded to the Core » Mon Apr 30, 2007 7:02 am I don't Know why exactly , But sense they are a living Bio-mechanical creature it's rather common sense to add a mouth to them , Also the whole Eva Body is Anatomicaly (sp?) Correct , And you can see that in there hands legs and the way the muscles are destrbuted on the Eva skilliton so yeah eva's as a concept design do resemble human forms. And yeah Eva's roar and stuff i suppose .
summary:
[]: What is the purpose of.....             Quote Post by Sachi » Mon Apr 23, 2007 8:03 pm the Eva's mouths, i kno, its already supossed to b sealed shut, when they're not berserk. but why dont they just seal the actual mouth like they did with the rest of the body, because the nose used to b there, right?

[]:             Quote Post by slothen » Mon Apr 23, 2007 8:07 pm A)
